name: workflow closed-loop step adr-to-spec hands off ADR ids to the /spec command for spec generation
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 d1\n' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/closed-loop-test.sh" --step adr-to-spec --adr-id 0001 --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'spec_invoked=true' out.txt && grep -q 'spec_input_adr=0001' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
